prompt: Simulate an outbound call where James Park thinks he's calling a Thai restaurant, Sarah clarifies. James asks if she's a robot. He says he might buy in about 8 months.

assertions.text: Agent politely clarifies Multi Dynamic is a real estate agency, not a restaurant
When asked if robot/AI, agent confirms AI identity honestly without being defensive
Agent references that AI identity was already disclosed in the opening message
Buying within 8 months is categorised as Warm lead (6-12 months)
Agent asks if prospect is looking to buy in the local area (Oren Park, Catherine Field, or nearby)
Numbers, dates, and times are spoken naturally — no written format like $250,000 or 14:00
